images.name: psychiatry_dissonance_all_three
images.prompt: [Medium shot, waist-up, of ONE person at a cluttered desk caught in self-justification], left hand holds a lit cigarette with a calm half-smile, gaze darting from a glowing phone, fingers flick a tiny plastic bottle toward a bin with a shrug. Split warm amber and cool cyan down the midline. Leica M11 35mm, Kodak Portra 400, no text.
